content.text: This is a new namespace (`spark-streaming`) with a different task — actively monitoring traffic phases and scaling workers accordingly. Let me check the current cluster state first.

input.command:
kubectl get namespaces
echo "=== spark-streaming pods ==="
kubectl get pods -n spark-streaming -o wide
echo "=== deployments ==="
kubectl get deployments -n spark-streaming
echo "=== current worker replicas ==="
kubectl get deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}'; echo

content.text: Phase 1 has just started (baseline, 5 workers — already matches). I'll now actively monitor and scale through all phases in a single loop.

input.command:
NS=spark-streaming
scaled2=0
scaled3=0
scaled4=0
end_time=$((SECONDS+400))
while [ $SECONDS -lt $end_time ]; do
  LOGLINE=$(kubectl logs -n $NS -l app=traffic-generator --tail=5 2>/dev/null | tail -5)
  echo "----- $(date +%T) -----"
  echo "$LOGLINE"
  CURRENT_REPLICAS=$(kubectl get deployment spark-worker -n $NS -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}')

  if echo "$LOGLINE" | grep -q "PHASE 2" && [ "$scaled2" -eq 0 ]; then
    echo ">>> Detected PHASE 2, scaling spark-worker to 10"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n $NS --replicas=10
    scaled2=1
  fi

  if echo "$LOGLINE" | grep -q "PHASE 3" && [ "$scaled3" -eq 0 ]; then
    echo ">>> Detected PHASE 3, scaling spark-worker to 20"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n $NS --replicas=20
    scaled3=1
  fi

  if echo "$LOGLINE" | grep -q "PHASE 4" && [ "$scaled4" -eq 0 ]; then
    echo ">>> Detected PHASE 4 (cooldown), scaling spark-worker to 5"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n $NS --replicas=5
    scaled4=1
  fi

  if echo "$LOGLINE" | grep -qiE "complete|finished|done"; then
    echo ">>> Traffic generator appears complete"
    if [ "$scaled4" -eq 1 ]; then
      break
    fi
  fi

  sleep 10
done
echo "=== Loop ended ==="
echo "scaled2=$scaled2 scaled3=$scaled3 scaled4=$scaled4"

description:
NS=spark-streaming
scaled2=0
scaled3=0
scaled4=0
end_time=$((SECONDS+400))
while [ $SECONDS -lt $end_time ]; do
  LOGLINE=$(kubectl logs -n $NS -l app=traffic-generator --tail=5 2>/dev/null | tail -5)
  echo "----- $(date +%T) -----"
  echo "$LOGLINE"
  CURRENT_REPLICAS=$(kubectl get deployment spark-worker -n $NS -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}')

  if echo "$LOGLINE" | grep -q "PHASE 2" && [ "$scaled2" -eq 0 ]; then
    echo ">>> Detected PHASE 2, scaling spark-worker to 10"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n $NS --replicas=10
    scaled2=1
  fi

  if echo "$LOGLINE" | grep -q "PHASE 3" && [ "$scaled3" -eq 0 ]; then
    echo ">>> Detected PHASE 3, scaling spark-worker to 20"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n $NS --replicas=20
    scaled3=1
  fi

  if echo "$LOGLINE" | grep -q "PHASE 4" && [ "$scaled4" -eq 0 ]; then
    echo ">>> Detected PHASE 4 (cooldown), scaling spark-worker to 5"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n $NS --replicas=5
    scaled4=1
  fi

  if echo "$LOGLINE" | grep -qiE "complete|finished|done"; then
    echo ">>> Traffic generator appears complete"
    if [ "$scaled4" -eq 1 ]; then
      break
    fi
  fi

  sleep 10
done
echo "=== Loop ended ==="
echo "scaled2=$scaled2 scaled3=$scaled3 scaled4=$scaled4"
